description: A storied Rhine-side grande dame in Basel, Grand Hotel Les Trois Rois pairs centuries of heritage with calm, contemporary refinement and impeccable service. Expect elegant rooms, a polished bar scene, and an ideal base for Art Basel energy, museums, and riverfront strolls.

On the shores of Lake Lucerne, Grand Hotel National offers classic grandeur with luminous water views and a relaxed Riviera-in-the-Alps rhythm. It’s an elegant base for lake cruises, Old Town wandering, and slow evenings on the terrace with the mountains in frame.

A refined alpine address in Gstaad, Grand Hotel Park blends classic Swiss hospitality with a modern, quietly glamorous finish. Expect serene interiors, attentive service, and a spa-led pace—perfect for winter sport, summer hikes, and village evenings done well.

In the heart of car-free Zermatt, Grand Hotel Zermatterhof delivers timeless alpine elegance with a warm, traditional spirit and views shaped by the Matterhorn. Between mountain days and spa time, it offers a classic sense of arrival with polished, quietly attentive service.

Grand Resort Bad Ragaz is Switzerland’s wellness classic, built around thermal waters, medical expertise, and a deeply restorative sense of calm. Expect refined rooms, serious spa facilities, and an unhurried rhythm focused on longevity, recovery, and quiet luxury.

Gstaad Palace is alpine legend: a stately hilltop icon with confident service, a spirited social scene, and sweeping views over the Saanenland. Equal parts heritage and spectacle, it’s made for winter glamour, summer mountain air, and nights that feel gently celebratory.

A lakeside classic in central Geneva, Hotel d’Angleterre blends old-world charm with discreet luxury and impeccable personal service. With the Jet d’Eau close by and elegant rooms overlooking the water, it’s a refined base for galleries, diplomacy, and polished evenings.

Kulm Hotel St. Moritz is a cornerstone of alpine hospitality, pairing historic grandeur with a confident, active resort rhythm. Expect excellent service, a strong spa, and easy access to winter sport and high-summer mountain pursuits—timeless, social, and unmistakably St. Moritz.

Set within a private park on Lake Geneva, La Réserve Genève feels like a discreet resort moments from the city. Expect polished rooms, an exceptional spa, and a calm, club-like atmosphere—ideal for wellness-led stays with easy access to Geneva’s cultural and business life.

La Réserve Zurich is a chic, lake-adjacent city retreat with a quiet sense of luxury and a gently residential mood. Expect refined interiors, attentive service, and a calm base for Zurich’s galleries, boutiques, and waterside walks—polished, discreet, and effortlessly composed.

Lausanne Palace & Spa is a grand city landmark with a serene, elevated perspective over Lake Geneva. Expect elegant rooms, impeccable service, and a strong wellness offering—perfect for pairing lakeside calm with the city’s cultural life and vineyard day trips nearby.

Perched above the Lavaux vineyards, Le Mirador is a tranquil, view-led retreat with a slow, restorative rhythm and sweeping Lake Geneva panoramas. Expect refined comfort, spa time, and easy access to wine villages and lakeside towns—quiet luxury with spectacular light.

LeCrans Hotel & Spa is an intimate mountain hideaway in Crans-Montana, offering contemporary alpine elegance and a calm, wellness-led pace. Expect panoramic terrace views, attentive service, and an easy blend of ski-season energy and summer hiking serenity.

Mandarin Oriental Lucerne brings polished modern luxury to the lakefront, pairing serene interiors with impeccable service and a quietly glamorous mood. Expect refined rooms, thoughtful dining, and effortless access to Lucerne’s Old Town, lake cruises, and mountain viewpoints.

A Zermatt icon with a refined, timeless spirit, Mont Cervin Palace pairs classic alpine elegance with a lively sense of occasion in the village centre. Between Matterhorn days and spa evenings, it offers impeccable service and a warm, celebratory atmosphere year-round.

Park Hotel Vitznau is an ultra-luxury lakeside retreat with a discreet, private-house feel and a deeply serene pace. Expect immaculate suites, exceptional dining, and spa-led days framed by Lake Lucerne—perfect for slow luxury, quiet recovery, and unforgettable views.

High above Zermatt with pristine Matterhorn views, Riffelalp Resort is a secluded alpine sanctuary reached by mountain railway. Expect crisp air, quiet luxury, and a restorative rhythm shaped by ski days, summer hikes, and spa time—remote, romantic, and deeply scenic.

Six Senses Crans-Montana is a design-led mountain retreat with a strong wellness focus and a quietly elevated sense of comfort. Expect spa rituals, thoughtful cuisine, and a serene base for ski-season days and summer alpine air—luxury with an unhurried, restorative pulse.

Suvretta House is a St. Moritz classic set above the lake, offering grand alpine elegance with a calm, gracious atmosphere. Expect impeccable service, winter sport at your doorstep, and summer mountain light—timeless, refined, and quietly confident.

The Alpina Gstaad is contemporary alpine luxury at its most assured, with impeccable design, discreet service, and a spa that sets the pace for slow, restorative stays. Expect mountain-view calm, refined dining, and effortless access to Gstaad’s village charm and slopes.

The Chedi Andermatt blends Asian-inspired serenity with Swiss mountain drama, delivering a sleek, warmly atmospheric retreat in the heart of the Alps. Expect a strong spa, glowing interiors, and an easy rhythm between ski days, summer hikes, and fireside evenings.

Set above the city with sweeping lake views, The Dolder Grand pairs contemporary art and design with historic grandeur and an exceptional spa. It’s Zurich luxury at its most complete—restorative, impeccably serviced, and perfectly placed for both culture and quiet escape.

THE VIEW Lugano is an intimate, contemporary hideaway with cinematic lake panoramas and a quietly romantic mood. Expect sleek suites, attentive service, and a calm base for lakeside days, Italian-Swiss dining, and scenic drives along the region’s sunlit shoreline.

The Woodward is a modern Geneva grande dame, bringing understated glamour, impeccable service, and a refined, residential calm to the lakefront. Expect elegant suites, a serious spa, and a polished base for the city’s cultural life and beautifully composed evenings.

In the quiet mountain village of Arosa, Tschuggen Grand Hotel offers a discreet alpine escape with a standout spa and a deeply restorative pace. Expect refined comfort, attentive service, and easy access to trails and slopes—serene, polished, and purposefully unhurried.

Victoria-Jungfrau Grand Hotel & Spa is a grand Interlaken landmark with an exceptional wellness focus and dramatic mountain scenery close at hand. Expect classic elegance, a serious spa, and effortless access to lakes, peaks, and panoramic rail journeys through the region.

Villa Honegg is a cliffside boutique retreat with a famously serene infinity pool and sweeping views over Lake Lucerne. Small, discreet, and deeply romantic, it’s designed for slow mornings, spa-led afternoons, and quiet luxury where the landscape does the talking.

Widder Hotel is Zurich boutique luxury with character: historic townhouses, contemporary design, and a warm, quietly playful atmosphere. Expect polished service, a strong bar scene, and an ideal Old Town base for galleries, boutiques, and late dinners done right.

A stately classic in The Hague, Hotel Des Indes delivers old-world elegance with a calm, diplomatic grandeur. Expect refined rooms, polished service, and a central base for museums, royal architecture, and seaside escapes—timeless, composed, and quietly luxurious.

Set on the Bosphorus in a former Ottoman palace, Çırağan Palace Kempinski is Istanbul at its most cinematic—waterfront grandeur, gardens, and a sense of historic theatre. Expect polished service, luminous views, and an elegant base for the city’s culture and cuisine.

D Maris Bay is a sun-drenched Aegean escape with multiple coves, a stylish social scene, and a polished resort rhythm. Expect beach clubs, excellent dining, and a sense of effortless glamour—built for long days on the water and golden evenings by the shore.

Four Seasons Hotel Istanbul at the Bosphorus is refined waterfront luxury with a serene, palace-like calm and exceptional service. Expect elegant rooms, a strong spa, and days shaped by the water—perfectly placed for historic districts, ferry rides, and late-night dining.

Mandarin Oriental Bodrum is a polished coastal retreat in Paradise Bay, pairing pristine sea views with calm, resort-scale luxury. Expect an excellent spa, refined dining, and a discreet, sunlit rhythm—ideal for yacht days, beach time, and restorative evenings.

Mandarin Oriental’s Istanbul city address in Etiler offers sleek, contemporary luxury with a refined, residential feel. Expect polished service, wellness-led comforts, and easy access to upscale shopping and dining—an elegant base for a modern Istanbul pace.

Six Senses Kocataş Mansions is a restored Bosphorus-side retreat that blends historic character with a calm, wellness-led sensibility. Expect thoughtful design, an excellent spa, and a quieter Istanbul rhythm—perfect for waterside mornings and elegant evenings across the strait.

The Bodrum EDITION brings sleek, design-led luxury to the coast with a confident social scene, refined dining, and sea-view calm when you want it. Expect a stylish pool rhythm by day and polished nightlife energy after dark—modern, effortless, and unmistakably EDITION.

The Peninsula Istanbul delivers modern grandeur on the waterfront with impeccable service, serene rooms, and a composed sense of arrival. Expect polished dining, a strong spa, and an ideal base for exploring historic quarters while returning to calm, sea-facing luxury.

Beresheet Hotel is a desert sanctuary perched above the Ramon Crater, designed for silence, stargazing, and deep, restorative calm. Expect warm, natural materials, a view-led pool scene, and a sense of space that makes the desert feel intimate and profoundly luxurious.

Mamilla Hotel is contemporary Jerusalem luxury at the edge of the Old City, blending sleek design with a strong sense of place. Expect polished rooms, a lively terrace scene, and effortless access to historic sites—ideal for culture-filled days and atmospheric evenings.

Six Senses Shaharut is a remote desert retreat where design, wellness, and landscape meet in near-total quiet. Expect spa-led days, thoughtful cuisine, and expansive views that reward slow living—an immersive escape built for stargazing nights and restorative stillness.

The Setai, Tel Aviv is a polished urban resort set within historic walls, offering sea views, a rooftop pool scene, and a quietly glamorous mood. Expect refined rooms, attentive service, and an ideal base for beaches, nightlife, and the city’s creative energy.

High in Oman’s mountains, Alila Jabal Akhdar is a dramatic, design-led retreat with canyon views and a cool, restorative pace. Expect thoughtful hospitality, firelit evenings, and days shaped by hiking trails, village visits, and quiet time above the heat.

Six Senses Zighy Bay is a secluded peninsula escape where rugged mountains meet the Gulf of Oman in cinematic style. Expect villa privacy, barefoot-luxe service, and days split between water adventures and spa calm—remote, romantic, and designed for total switch-off.

Rosewood Doha brings contemporary, design-led luxury to the capital with a refined sense of place and a polished, city-resort rhythm. Expect elegant rooms, destination dining, and spa-led calm—ideal for cultural days, waterfront evenings, and modern Gulf glamour.

Banyan Tree AlUla is a secluded desert retreat set among sandstone formations, offering villa privacy and a deeply tranquil pace. Expect warm, tactile design, restorative spa rituals, and cinematic landscapes—perfect for heritage explorations by day and star-filled silence at night.

Habitas AlUla is a design-forward desert camp with a strong sense of atmosphere—minimal, soulful, and deeply connected to the landscape. Expect wellness touches, curated experiences, and a relaxed communal rhythm, set against the dramatic geology and heritage of AlUla.

Nobu Hotel Riyadh brings sleek, contemporary luxury with a strong culinary identity and a polished, modern-city mood. Expect refined rooms, attentive service, and a social rhythm anchored by dining—ideal for business-led stays with an elevated, design-forward finish.

Six Senses Southern Dunes is a desert retreat shaped by wellness, design, and expansive Red Sea hinterland landscapes. Expect restorative spa rituals, thoughtful cuisine, and a quiet sense of escape—built for slow days in the dunes and star-filled nights far from the pace.

Atlantis The Royal is Dubai’s new statement of ultra-luxury—bold architecture, high-energy dining, and a resort scene designed for spectacle. Expect expansive views, polished service, and a social rhythm that moves from poolside theatre to late-night glamour with ease.

Bulgari Resort Dubai is a refined island-style escape with discreet glamour, impeccable service, and a calm, yacht-club sensibility. Expect elegant suites and villas, polished dining, and a serene base that feels removed from the city—luxury with quiet confidence and sea air.
